case_title: LOUIS MICHAEL KESSLER VS. "CHRISSY" et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-03-2013 CONTINUED TO JAN-28-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CIVIL RIGHTS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KESSLER, LOUIS MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT "CHRISSY" 24 HOUR FITNESS SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-23-2013 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-19-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-08-2013

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KESSLER, LOUIS MICHAEL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-03-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-28-2014 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-03-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-23-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JAN-28-2014 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST LOUIS MICHAEL KESSLER FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: DEC-03-2013, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-23-2013. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
